name: EuiLoadingLogo
visualDescription: An animated Elastic product logo (defaulting to the Elastic mark or a specified product logomark) with a pulsing or fading animation, shown at a large size (xl or xxl). Used on full-page or large-panel loading screens. NOT EuiLoadingSpinner (EuiLoadingLogo shows a product logo; EuiLoadingSpinner shows a generic ring).

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

logo.description: While this component should be restricted to using logo icons, it works with any IconType
